questionHtml: Sketch, on the axes, how the electric potential V due to the two charges varies with the distance r from the centre of the left charge. No numbers are required. Your graph should extend from r = 0 to r = D.
markschemeHtml:
Constant, non-zero within spheres ✓

A clear, non-zero positive minimum at C ✓

Symmetric bowl shaped up curved shape in between ✓

 

Do not allow a bowl shaped down curve for MP3.
